ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: Roasted peanuts (25%), jumbo raisins (25%) (raisins (99.5%), sunflower oil), cashew nuts (25%), candied pineapple (25%) (pineapple (51%), cane sugar (48%), acidity regulator (citric acid), preservative (sulphur dioxide)). May also contain other nuts, sesame seeds, soya, milk.
product_name: nuts & fruits Roasted peanuts, jumbo raisins, cashew nuts and candied pineapple
